# Bot Ideas Log
# Generated by the DreamCobots Builder Bot Fleet
# All ideas below are candidates for future development.

## Orchestration Builder Bot
- AutoScalerBot — dynamically provisions cloud workers based on queue depth
- HealthCheckBot — pings all active bots every 60 s and pages on failure
- CostOptimizerBot — picks cheapest cloud region per task type
- CircuitBreakerBot — disables failing bots to prevent cascade errors
- PipelineVisualiserBot — generates a live Mermaid diagram of active workflows
- DeadLetterQueueBot — inspects and retries failed Celery tasks automatically

## Voice Engine Builder Bot
- MultilingualDubBot — auto-dubs video content into 50+ languages
- EmotionDetectorBot — infers speaker emotion from audio for adaptive responses
- VoiceAgeSimulatorBot — renders a voice as younger or older for creative content
- DialectCoachBot — gives real-time feedback on accent and pronunciation
- SpeechToSongBot — converts spoken word into melodic AI-generated vocals
- RealTimeCaptionBot — streams captions from live voice with <100 ms latency

## Image / Video Builder Bot
- HologramBot — renders AR/VR 3-D avatar overlays for remote meetings
- AutoDirectorBot — applies color grading and motion effects to raw footage
- AdThumbnailBot — generates platform-optimised ad thumbnails from prompts
- CGISceneBuilderBot — creates photorealistic background scenes for videos
- MusicVideoBot — syncs AI-generated visuals to beat timings of a music track
- ProductVisualizerBot — renders 3-D product spins from a single photo
- DeepfakeGuardBot — detects and flags AI-manipulated media for safety

## Marketplace Builder Bot
- SubscriptionTierManagerBot — auto-manages user plan upgrades/downgrades
- BotLeasingBot — offers time-limited bot licenses with auto-expiry
- RevenueShareBot — splits marketplace revenue between creators automatically
- MarketplaceRecommenderBot — personalises bot suggestions based on usage
- WhiteLabelPackagerBot — repackages bots under custom branding for resellers
- APIGatewayBuilderBot — generates OpenAPI specs and rate-limited gateway for each bot
- HealthcareMarketplacePlaceholder — HIPAA-compliant bot listing for medical apps
- EduMarketplacePlaceholder — curriculum-aligned bot catalogue for EdTech

## Creative Studio Builder Bot
- InteractiveAdBot — adapts ad content in real-time based on viewer interactions
- MusicVideoDirectorBot — syncs AI visuals to beat timings of an uploaded track
- TikTokTrendBot — auto-generates short-form content aligned with trending sounds
- ScriptToTrailerBot — converts a screenplay synopsis into a 60-second teaser
- PersonalisedContentBot — tailors ads to individual viewer demographics
- CineColorGraderBot — applies Hollywood-grade colour grading to raw footage
- LyricVideoBot — generates animated lyric videos from music tracks
- BrandKitBot — creates a full visual brand identity (logo, palette, fonts) on demand

## Bot Tester & Integrator
- SyntheticMonitorBot — runs scheduled synthetic transactions to verify bot health
- ChaosMonkeyBot — randomly disables non-critical bots to test resilience
- LoadSimulatorBot — generates artificial traffic to stress-test pipelines
- CoverageTrackerBot — measures test-coverage deltas across bot code changes
- CanaryDeployerBot — gradually rolls out new bot versions to a small user segment
- AlertDispatcherBot — pages on-call when bot error rate exceeds thresholds

## Future / Emerging Categories
- ARTourGuideBot — AR-powered location-aware city tour experiences
- VRTrainingBot — immersive VR safety and skills training simulations
- QuantumOptimiserBot — uses quantum-inspired algorithms for scheduling
- NeuromorphicBot — edge-AI bot that runs on low-power neuromorphic chips
- BlockchainAuditBot — publishes bot activity hashes to an immutable ledger
- FederatedLearningBot — trains models across distributed devices without centralising data
- SustainabilityBot — measures and offsets carbon footprint of cloud bot workloads
- AccessibilityBot — auto-generates WCAG-compliant captions, audio descriptions, and alt-text
